title: The Alhambra Palace
text: The Alhambra is a palace and fortress complex located in Granada, Andalusia, Spain. Built during the 13th and 14th centuries by the Nasrid dynasty, it represents the pinnacle of Moorish architecture in Europe. The complex features intricate Islamic art, beautiful gardens, and sophisticated water management systems. Its detailed stucco work, tile mosaics, and carved wooden ceilings showcase the artistic achievements of Al-Andalus.
